todayStoryline.headline: France face England in Miami bronze final
todayStoryline.subtitle: Deschamps to bow out as both sides seek consolation after semi-final defeats

facts.home: Didier Deschamps will manage his final France match, ending a 14-year tenure.
facts.away: England have never won a World Cup third-place play-off, losing both previous attempts.

news.headline: Major US networks decline to air Trump speech live
news.body: ABC, NBC and CNN chose not to broadcast President Trump’s primetime election-security address on their main channels, offering streaming coverage instead. The decision sparked debate over editorial judgement and whether networks should carry contentious presidential remarks live.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
